paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的'analysed'可能误导学生去找'analyse'原词，但原文用的是'ended up with'和'stories recorded'，需理解整体含义。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'fairy tales analysed by Tehrani'，到原文找Tehrani和故事相关的表述，发现'stories recorded from oral traditions'对应分析的故事集合。

questions.title: Questions 32–36
instructions: Complete the summary using the list of words, A–I, below.
Write the correct letter, A–I, in boxes 32–36 on your answer sheet.
Phylogenetic analysis of Little Red Riding Hood
A ending  B events  C warning  D links  E records  F variations  G horror  H people  I plot

items.prompt: Tehrani used techniques from evolutionary biology to find out if __________ existed among 58 stories from around the world.

pairs.q: used techniques from evolutionary biology to find out if
pairs.p: Once his phylogenetic analysis had established that they were indeed related
pairs.note: 题干说用进化生物学技术来查明是否存在关系，原文说系统发育分析确立了它们确实相关，是句式改写。

pairs.q: existed among 58 stories from around the world
pairs.note: 题干问故事之间是否存在关系，原文说它们确实相关，'related'替换'existed'。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干问是否存在关系，原文直接说已经确立相关，所以答案是D（关系存在）。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'techniques from evolutionary biology'和'existed among stories'，到原文找对应，发现'phylogenetic analysis'对应'techniques from evolutionary biology'，'they were indeed related'对应'existed'。

items.prompt: He also wanted to know which aspects of the stories had fewest __________, as he believed these aspects would be the most important ones.

pairs.note: fewest和least都表示‘最少’，是同义替换。
题干和原文中‘aspects of the story’几乎完全一致，是定位的关键。

pairs.q: he believed these aspects would be the most important ones
pairs.note: 题干说‘他认为这些方面最重要’，原文说‘表明它们的重要性’，是句式改写。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的‘fewest’对应原文的‘least’，而不是‘most’或‘alter’。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干中的‘fewest’和‘aspects of the stories’，到原文找‘least’和‘aspects of the story’，定位到第一句。

items.prompt: Contrary to other beliefs, he found that some __________ that were included in a story tended to change over time ...

pairs.note: 题干说'随时间变化'，原文说'可以相当自由地演变'，意思相同。
题干说'故事中包含的'，原文说'细节'，细节是故事的一部分。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干有'Contrary to other beliefs'，但定位句没有直接对应，不要被干扰。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'tended to change over time'，到原文找同义表达'can evolve quite freely'，同时注意'story'对应'details'。

items.prompt: He was also surprised that parts of a story which seemed to provide some sort of __________ were unimportant.

pairs.note: unimportant（不重要的）与trivial（琐碎的、不重要的）是同义词替换。

pairs.q: parts of a story which seemed to provide some sort of
pairs.note: 题干中的'故事的某些部分似乎提供了某种...'被概括为'such elements'（这类成分），是句式改写。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中'surprised'可能误导学生找表示惊讶的词，但原文对应的是'flexible'，注意不要被干扰。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'unimportant'，到原文找同义词'trivial'；同时注意'such elements'指代前文提到的'parts of a story'，从而定位答案。

items.prompt: The aspect that he found most important in a story’s survival was __________.

pairs.q: most important in a story's survival
pairs.note: 题干说'故事存活最重要的方面'，原文说'保留得最完整'，意思相同。
aspect原词复现，帮助定位。

pairs.p: turned out to be the best preserved
pairs.note: 题干用'认为最重要'，原文用'结果是保留最完整'，句式不同但表达同一概念。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干问的是'最重要的方面'，而原文提到'恐惧'是答案，但选项G对应的是'保留最完整'，不要误选其他选项如'血腥'或'可怕'。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'most important'和'survival'，到原文找对应表达'best preserved'，同时注意'aspect'原词复现，定位到该句后确认答案。

questions.title: Questions 37–40
instructions: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
Write the correct letter in boxes 37–40 on your answer sheet.

items.prompt:
What method did Jamie Tehrani use to test his ideas about fairy tales?
A  He compared oral and written forms of the same stories.
B  He looked at many different forms of the same basic story.
C  He looked at unrelated stories from many different countries.
D  He contrasted the development of fairy tales with that of living creatures.

pairs.q: test his ideas about fairy tales
pairs.note: 题干中的'test his ideas'对应原文的'analysis focused on'，都是指进行研究或检验想法。

pairs.q: many different forms of the same basic story
pairs.p: Little Red Riding Hood in its many forms
pairs.note: 题干中的'many different forms of the same basic story'对应原文的'Little Red Riding Hood in its many forms'，都是指同一个故事的不同版本。

paraphrase.trap: A选项中的'oral and written forms'在原文未提及，属于无中生有；C选项'unrelated stories'与原文的'Little Red Riding Hood'（同一故事）矛盾；D选项'contrasted with living creatures'在原文未出现。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'test his ideas'和'many different forms of the same basic story'，到原文找对应，发现'analysis focused on'和'Little Red Riding Hood in its many forms'，从而定位答案B。

items.prompt:
When discussing Tehrani’s views, Jack Zipes suggests that
A  Tehrani ignores key changes in the role of women.
B  stories which are too horrific are not always taken seriously.
C  Tehrani overemphasises the importance of violence in stories.
D  features of stories only survive if they have a deeper significance.

pairs.q: features of stories only survive if they have a deeper significance
pairs.p: they won’t stick unless they matter
pairs.note: 题干说故事特征只有有深层意义才能存活，原文说它们不会流传除非它们重要，意思相同。
survive（存活）对应stick（流传），同义替换。
deeper significance（深层意义）对应matter（重要），同义替换。

paraphrase.trap: A选项提到女性角色变化，原文未涉及；B选项说恐怖故事不被认真对待，原文说即使恐怖也会流传；C选项说过度强调暴力，原文未提。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'survive'和'deeper significance'，到原文找对应词'stick'和'matter'，定位到这句话。

items.prompt:
Why does Tehrani refer to Chinese and Japanese fairy tales?
A  to indicate that Jack Zipes’ theory is incorrect
B  to suggest that crime is a global problem
C  to imply that all fairy tales have a similar meaning
D  to add more evidence for Jack Zipes’ ideas

pairs.note: 题干中的'fairy tales'替换为原文的'versions'，指代同一故事的不同版本。
题干中的'refer to'（提及）与原文的'known as'（被称为）在语境中对应，都是引出故事名称。

paraphrase.trap: 选项D 'to add more evidence for Jack Zipes’ ideas'可能被误选，但原文中Tehrani引用中国和日本版本是为了反驳Zipes的理论，而非支持。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'Chinese and Japanese fairy tales'，到原文找'Chinese and Japanese versions'，定位后理解上下文：Tehrani用这些版本指出Zipes理论中的错误（反派性别不同），因此选A。

items.prompt:
What does Mathias Clasen believe about fairy tales?
A  They are a safe way of learning to deal with fear.
B  They are a type of entertainment that some people avoid.
C  They reflect the changing values of our society.
D  They reduce our ability to deal with real-world problems.

pairs.q: safe way of learning to deal with fear
pairs.p: teach us what it feels like to be afraid without having to experience real danger
pairs.note: 题干说‘安全地学习应对恐惧’，原文说‘无需经历真正危险就学会害怕的感觉’，意思一致。

pairs.q: safe way of learning to deal with fear
pairs.p: build up resistance to negative emotions
pairs.note: ‘学习应对恐惧’的结果就是‘增强对负面情绪的抵抗力’。
题干中的‘童话故事’在原文中被替换为‘恐怖故事’，属于同义替换。

paraphrase.trap: 选项C‘反映社会价值观变化’和D‘降低处理现实问题的能力’原文未提及；选项B‘一些人避免的娱乐’与原文‘教我们害怕’矛盾。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘safe way of learning to deal with fear’，到原文找‘without having to experience real danger’和‘build up resistance’，对应选项A。
